summary: Episode 12: Tariq returned to the rooftop alone to copy the star patterns onto a tablet and noticed a faint hazy smudge of light he couldn't explain. Salim joined him with an old worn star chart and taught that even the great maps of the past were imperfect and corrected by patient observers over generations, who sometimes recorded faint clouds no one yet understood. The lesson: record honestly what you truly see. Tariq has begun keeping his own careful star observations. Noor still doesn't know who leaves the gifts at her door.
